_comment: Act 1 / Challenge 1.1 — Malört Fountains (voice dialogue). Beacon firmware loads this from /spiffs/challenge_1_1.json at boot.

voice.prompt: Speak: intake, crib, tunnel, Jardine plant, grid

espnow_fallback.note: When badge caps.voice is false the beacon captures audio via its own microphone (if present), uploads the blob to audio_upload_endpoint, and passes the resulting ref in VOICE_CAPTURE_SUBMIT.ref over ESP-NOW.

custom.lesson_topic: Lake Michigan water-treatment: intake cribs, Jardine plant, distribution grid
custom.landmark_hint: Drinking fountain (currently dispensing Malört by DEEPDISH order)

sim.mock_transcript: intake crib tunnel jardine plant grid
sim.note: Simulator injects mock_transcript as a VOICE_CAPTURE_SUBMIT.t body so the full server validate() path runs without hardware. Override via STT_MOCK_TRANSCRIPT env var.
